title: ProcedureCatalog
description: Per-procedure catalog file produced by setup-ddl. Contains outbound references and inbound callers.

ddl_hash.description: SHA-256 of normalized source DDL. Used for diff-aware reexport.

stale.description: True when the object was present in a prior extraction but absent in the latest.

needs_llm.description: True when body contains EXEC(@var), TRY/CATCH, WHILE, or IF/ELSE. Set by body scan during export.

needs_enrich.description: True when body contains SELECT INTO, TRUNCATE, or static EXEC chains. Flipped to false by catalog-enrich.

mode.description: Canonical routing mode for this procedure.

routing_reasons.description: Canonical routing reasons detected for this procedure.

references.description: Outbound: what this procedure depends on.

statements.description: Resolved statement classification. Written by the analyzing-table skill (procedure analysis reference) after all needs_llm actions are resolved to migrate or skip.

type.description: Statement type, e.g. Insert, Update, Merge, Command.

action.description: migrate: core DML that becomes the dbt model. skip: operational overhead.

source.description: How the action was determined: ast (deterministic sqlglot parse) or llm (Claude analysis of dynamic SQL/call graph).

rationale.description: Why this statement is migrate or skip. Required for source: llm; optional for source: ast.

table_slices.description: Per-table DDL slices for multi-table-writer procs. Keyed by normalized table FQN (schema.table). Written by analyzing-table when this proc is selected_writer for a table.

refactor.description: Written by the refactoring-sql skill via refactor write. Contains extracted core SQL and refactored CTE SQL for this writer procedure.

status.description: ok = refactored SQL produced and audit passed; partial = audit failed; error = could not proceed.

extracted_sql.description: Core transformation SELECT extracted from the stored procedure (USING clause for MERGE, SELECT for INSERT...SELECT, etc.).

refactored_sql.description: Refactored CTE SQL (import/logical/final pattern) that passed the equivalence audit.

shared_sources.description: Source table FQNs shared with other objects in the same refactor batch. Written by refactor sweep.

warnings.description: Diagnostic warnings for this procedure (e.g. MULTI_TABLE_WRITE).
